query: SELECT DATE(exitDate) as trade_date, COUNT(*) as trade_count, SUM(pnl)/100 as total_pnl FROM trades WHERE DAYOFWEEK(exitDate) = 7 GROUP BY DATE(exitDate) ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wv7ueKqB8G6f57.b62a6ae065f5 --database jFmY8c2b9B6TEBRxmcJws8 --execute SELECT DATE(exitDate) as trade_date, COUNT(*) as trade_count, SUM(pnl)/100 as total_pnl FROM trades WHERE DAYOFWEEK(exitDate) = 7 GROUP BY DATE(exitDate) ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 10;
